coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Trigger Tremor Burst
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal 15 SP damage

[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal 25 SP damage
If target is Staggered, in Low Morale, or in Panic, deal 30% of damage dealt as bonus damage

[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal 25 SP damage
If target is Staggered, in Low Morale, or in Panic, deal 30% of damage dealt as bonus damage
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 Sinking

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 7 Tremor
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 7 Sinking
If target is NOT Staggered, in Low Morale, nor in Panic, deal 50% of damage dealt as bonus damage

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 10 Tremor
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 10 Sinking
If target is NOT Staggered, in Low Morale, nor in Panic, deal 50% of damage dealt as bonus damage

2030211.name: Wave of Depression
2030211.desc:
The target of the rightmost skill on the Dashboard loses SP by (2x Gloom A-Reson.) after the attack.
(Targets without SP values take Gloom damage instead.)
